personal.bio: Senior Frontend Engineer with 6+ years of experience building scalable web and mobile applications on React and TypeScript. Specialization: headless e-commerce, GraphQL data layers, performance optimization, modular UI systems, and React Native. Open to remote offers.
personal.skills: React, React Native, TypeScript, Redux, Zustand, React Query, Context API, Expo, Next.js, Vite, React Hook Form, SCSS/SASS, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, GraphQL, Shopify/Hydrogen, Git, GitHub Actions, Jira, Figma, Postman, Sentry, Docker, Playwright, Jest, BLE, HealthKit, Health Connect, Google Fit, OTA Firmware Updates, Push Notifications, WebView, Commander.js
personal.work_experience_text:
Senior Frontend Engineer @ ShellLogix (Oct 2021 – Present, Yerevan):
- Developed complex React and React Native applications: analytics platforms, e-commerce, corporate dashboards
- Designed modular frontend architecture and GraphQL data layers for maintainability
- Built headless Shopify storefronts (Hydrogen), custom checkout flows, cross-platform mobile apps
- Collaborated with international US/EU teams on scalable solutions

Data Researcher / Editor @ Opta Sports by Stats Perform (Nov 2016 – Mar 2025, Yerevan/Remote):
- Managed and validated large-scale sports datasets with 100% accuracy under strict deadlines
- Coordinated with global teams for real-time statistics delivery to broadcast and media partners
- Applied sports data expertise to build accurate filter UIs and stats dashboards
